title: Illusionist / 幻术师
description:
A standalone mirror-and-illusion character for Slay the Spire 2, with three coupled systems:

- Mirror: "Copy" summons mirror images that replay your first card each turn and shatter when you take unblocked damage.
- Intent: read and reflect enemy telegraphs (Counter, Foresight, Provoke).
- Transmute: temporarily reshape your own cards (Shifting Blade, Myriad Faces, Phantom Blast), with a transmute stack that unwinds one layer per turn.

~40 themed cards, custom relics and potions, a starter relic, and Orobas (Ancient) relic/card upgrades.

Fully localized in English and 简体中文.
changeNote: v0.2.5 - All card IDs now carry an _ILLUSIONIST suffix to avoid clashes with other mods. Reversal reworked: turn an enemy's attack intent into it gaining that much Block (its other intents are kept). Fluxweave reworked: draw 1 card for every 2 cards you transform, upgrade grants Innate, and each copy is now its own separate status counter (like Orbit) that settles independently; the turn-start transmute-revert also counts. Last Stand now Exhausts; Dim Lamp gives 1 energy (was 2); Summon's text clarified. Plus the 0.2.4 content: new cards Phantom Venom and Feint, static character art, Sabotage/Dim Lamp in the compendium, many balance tweaks, and several event/startup crash fixes. English & 简体中文.
